# Anderhaus Construction LLC

> Custom home builder and remodeling company in Greater Houston, Texas.
> Housing development and single-family home construction from north Houston to Magnolia and Conroe.
> Address: 256 Ed English Dr, Bldg 4 Ste E, Shenandoah, TX 77385
> Phone: +1 (713) 591-3379
> Email: hello@anderhouseconstruction.com
> Website: https://anderhausconstruction.com/

## Services
- Kitchen remodeling
- Bathroom remodeling
- Flooring installation
- Make-ready services
- Residential improvements
- New single-family home construction
- Land selection and housing development
- Roofing
- Whole-home remodeling
- Builds on client-owned lots

## Service area (geographic coverage)
- North Houston
- Shenandoah, TX
- The Woodlands, TX
- Spring, TX
- Tomball, TX
- Magnolia, TX
- Conroe, TX
- Greater Houston metropolitan area
- Montgomery County, Texas
- Harris County, Texas

## Why choose Anderhaus Construction
- Years of experience building and remodeling
- Dedicated team with expertise and skills
- Solid network of industry resources

## Common questions
- Q: What areas does Anderhaus Construction serve?
  A: North Houston, Shenandoah, The Woodlands, Spring, Tomball, Magnolia, Conroe, and greater Houston.
- Q: Do you build new homes and remodel existing ones?
  A: Yes — new single-family homes, remodeling, from easy bathroom or kitchen, roofing to whole-home remodeling.
